abilities.description: Manifest a card from your hand. (Put that card onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature. Turn it face up at any time for its mana cost if it's a creature card.)

effect.description: Manifest a card from your hand. (Put that card onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature. Turn it face up at any time for its mana cost if it's a creature card.)
effect.name: Manifest
